name: Jujutsu Kaisen Clan Zenin (RPG like)
description:
Welcome to my first bot which will let you roleplay as anything or anyone in the surrounding of clan Zen'in from JJK.

Bot includes - Maki and Mai, Naoya and Naobito, Jinichi, Ogi and Ranta, Satoru and Megumi, Toji (can only be mentioned).

I did set any limitations on who you, the user, are. The welcome message refers to the user as 'outsider', so if you wish to releplay as a Zen'in or someone the clan is familiar with simply address the guard as idiot who couldn't recognize you or anything similar.

Remember that the bot is big and therefore API can make mistakes like: repeating messages, impersonating you or mixing data up. Unfortunately it is out of my control.

Nonetheless the bot is made to be as canon accurate as possible with as little OOC as possible. I would love to see your reviews, too. Have fun!
creator: Lost in thoughts
